name: Chineese Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the beef and brown it until well done. Drain excess fat.
2. Sprinkle salt and ginger over the meat. Add chopped onion and 1 cup of cold water. Stir in soy sauce.
3. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover tightly, and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours or until beef is tender.
4. In a small bowl, mix remaining water with cornstarch until smooth. Stir into the meat mixture until thickened.
5. Add remaining ingredients except Mandarin oranges. Cook, stirring constantly, until veggies are crisp-tender (about 5-7 minutes).
6. Fold in the drained Mandarin oranges and serve over chow mein noodles or rice. For rice, use the orange juice for added flavor. Makes approximately 6 servings.
